message.content:
Create all the shadcn/ui-style components and the full UI for the Greg CRM at /Users/canerden/greg/.claude/worktrees/nostalgic-mcnulty/. This is a Next.js 16 App Router project with React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, and these installed packages: @radix-ui/* primitives, cmdk, lucide-react, class-variance-authority, clsx, tailwind-merge, sonner, @tanstack/react-query, @tanstack/react-table, @dnd-kit/core, @dnd-kit/sortable.

The design should be Folk CRM-inspired: warm neutrals (#fafaf8 base), minimal borders, clean typography, slide-over panels.

A utility file exists at lib/utils.ts with: `cn()` (clsx+twMerge), `initials()`, `avatarColor()`, `daysSince()`, `formatRelativeDate()`.

## 1. Create shadcn/ui primitives in components/ui/

Create these files as minimal Radix wrappers with Tailwind styling using the `cn()` utility from `@/lib/utils`:

**components/ui/button.tsx** — Button with variants: default, outline, ghost, destructive. Sizes: default, sm, lg, icon. Use CVA.

**components/ui/input.tsx** — Styled input field

**components/ui/textarea.tsx** — Styled textarea

**components/ui/badge.tsx** — Badge with color variants: default, secondary, outline, plus colors: rose, blue, amber, emerald, violet, cyan, pink, orange, gray

**components/ui/avatar.tsx** — Radix Avatar with image + fallback (initials)

**components/ui/dialog.tsx** — Radix Dialog (overlay modal)

**components/ui/sheet.tsx** — Radix Dialog used as a slide-over panel from the right side. This is critical for the contact/company detail view.

**components/ui/dropdown-menu.tsx** — Radix DropdownMenu

**components/ui/popover.tsx** — Radix Popover

**components/ui/select.tsx** — Radix Select

**components/ui/tabs.tsx** — Radix Tabs

**components/ui/tooltip.tsx** — Radix Tooltip

**components/ui/separator.tsx** — Radix Separator

**components/ui/scroll-area.tsx** — Radix ScrollArea

**components/ui/command.tsx** — cmdk Command palette wrapper

**components/ui/table.tsx** — HTML table with consistent styling

**components/ui/label.tsx** — Radix Label

**components/ui/card.tsx** — Simple card container

**components/ui/skeleton.tsx** — Loading skeleton

## 2. Create layout components

**components/layout/sidebar.tsx** — The main sidebar (280px wide). Contains:
- Workspace name at top with a small logo icon (black circle with "G")
- "Ask Greg" button showing ⌘K shortcut
- Navigation links: Contacts, Companies, Pipelines, Activity (use lucide-react icons: Users, Building2, Kanban, Activity)
- Tags section (collapsible, shows tag badges with counts)
- User menu at bottom (avatar + name)
- Use `usePathname()` from next/navigation to highlight active nav item
- Accept `tags` prop as array of `{id, name, color, count}`
- Accept `onOpenCommandBar` prop

**components/layout/app-shell.tsx** — The wrapper that contains sidebar + main content area. Flex layout, full height.

**components/layout/user-menu.tsx** — Avatar + name dropdown with "Settings" and "Sign out" options. Use the DropdownMenu component.

## 3. Create shared components

**components/shared/data-table.tsx** — Generic DataTable using TanStack Table v8 + the ui/table component. Props: `columns` (ColumnDef[]), `data` (T[]), `onRowClick`. Features: column sorting (click header), sticky header. Keep it simple but extensible.

**components/shared/data-table-toolbar.tsx** — Search input + optional filter controls. Props: `searchValue`, `onSearchChange`, `placeholder`.

**components/shared/tag-badge.tsx** — A tag badge that maps tag color names to Tailwind classes. Props: `name`, `color`, `onRemove?`.

**components/shared/tag-input.tsx** — Multi-select tag input. Shows existing tags as badges, with a popover to search/add tags. Props: `value` (string[]), `onChange`, `availableTags`.

**components/shared/empty-state.tsx** — Empty state with icon, title, description, and optional action button.

**components/shared/contact-avatar.tsx** — Avatar showing initials with deterministic colors based on name. Props: `name`, `avatarUrl?`, `size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'`.

## 4. Create Contacts components

**components/contacts/contacts-table.tsx** — The contacts table using DataTable. Columns: checkbox, Name (with avatar), Company, Title, Tags (badge list), Last contacted (relative date with color coding: green <30d, amber <60d, red >60d), Next action. Click row to open sheet.

**components/contacts/contact-sheet.tsx** — Slide-over detail panel using Sheet component. Shows: large avatar + name + title at top, company link, email/phone/linkedin/twitter links, tags, notes section, activity timeline (recent interactions), action buttons (Edit, Log interaction, Delete). Use Tabs for organizing: Overview | Activity | Notes.

**components/contacts/contact-form.tsx** — Form for adding/editing a contact. Fields: name*, email, phone, company (with autocomplete from existing companies), title, linkedin, twitter, source, tags, notes. Used inside both Dialog (for add) and Sheet (for edit).

## 5. Create Companies components

**components/companies/companies-table.tsx** — Companies table with columns: Name, Domain, Industry, Contacts count, Created date.

**components/companies/company-sheet.tsx** — Slide-over with company info + list of linked contacts.

**components/companies/company-form.tsx** — Form for add/edit company.

## 6. Create Pipeline components

**components/pipelines/pipeline-board.tsx** — Kanban board using @dnd-kit. Renders columns (stages) horizontally. Each column has contact cards. Cards are draggable between columns. Props: `pipeline` (with stages and contacts).

**components/pipelines/pipeline-column.tsx** — A single kanban column. Header with stage name, color dot, count. Contains sortable droppable area for cards.

**components/pipelines/pipeline-card.tsx** — A draggable contact card showing: avatar, name, company, tags. Compact design.

## 7. Create Activity components

**components/activity/activity-timeline.tsx** — Vertical timeline showing interactions. Each item has: icon (based on type), title, body preview, relative timestamp, contact name link. Types with icons: note (FileText), email_sent (Send), email_received (Mail), call (Phone), meeting (Calendar), stage_change (ArrowRight).

**components/activity/activity-item.tsx** — Single timeline item.

## 8. Create AI components

**components/ai/command-bar.tsx** — THE key component. Uses cmdk Command palette. Fixed modal overlay (like Spotlight/Raycast). Three modes:
1. Default: search contacts/companies by typing
2. Slash commands: /add, /log, /email, /pipeline
3. AI chat: if input doesn't match a command, it's sent to Claude
Shows chat messages inline. Proposed actions show as actionable cards below.

**components/ai/action-review.tsx** — A card showing a proposed AI action with Approve/Dismiss buttons. Shows action type icon, description, and details.

## 9. Create Providers

**components/providers.tsx** — Wraps children with QueryClientProvider (TanStack Query) and SessionProvider (next-auth/react). Export as default.

## 10. Create App pages

**app/layout.tsx** — Root layout. Imports globals.css. Wraps children in Providers.

**app/page.tsx** — Redirects to /contacts (using `redirect` from next/navigation)

**app/(app)/layout.tsx** — The authenticated layout. Renders AppShell with Sidebar + {children}. Fetches tags for the sidebar.

**app/(app)/contacts/page.tsx** — Contacts page. Fetches contacts, renders ContactsTable, has "Add contact" button opening a Dialog with ContactForm, has ContactSheet that opens when a row is clicked.

**app/(app)/companies/page.tsx** — Companies page. Same pattern as contacts.

**app/(app)/pipelines/page.tsx** — Pipelines list. Shows cards for each pipeline with stage count and contact count. "Create pipeline" button.

**app/(app)/pipelines/[id]/page.tsx** — Pipeline kanban board page.

**app/(app)/activity/page.tsx** — Activity timeline page with filters.

**app/(app)/settings/page.tsx** — Settings page (workspace name, integrations placeholder).

**app/login/page.tsx** — Login page. Clean, centered card with "Sign in with Google" button and the Greg logo. Warm background.

## IMPORTANT NOTES:
- Use `'use client'` directive for all interactive components
- Server components for page.tsx files where possible (but if they use hooks, make them client)
- Import icons from `lucide-react`
- Use the cn() utility from `@/lib/utils` for conditional classes
- All data fetching in client components should use fetch() to the API routes (we'll add TanStack Query hooks later)
- Colors: use the CSS variables defined in globals.css via Tailwind classes like `bg-background`, `text-foreground`, `border-border`, etc. But also use direct Tailwind colors for accents (emerald, amber, rose, etc.)
- Keep the aesthetic minimal and warm — Folk CRM-inspired
- WRITE ALL FILES. Do not skip any.

1→import { clsx, type ClassValue } from 'clsx'
     2→import { twMerge } from 'tailwind-merge'
     3→
     4→export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
     5→  return twMerge(clsx(inputs))
     6→}
     7→
     8→export function initials(name: string): string {
     9→  return name
    10→    .split(' ')
    11→    .map((w) => w[0])
    12→    .filter(Boolean)
    13→    .slice(0, 2)
    14→    .join('')
    15→    .toUpperCase()
    16→}
    17→
    18→const AVATAR_COLORS = [
    19→  'bg-rose-100 text-rose-700',
    20→  'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',
    21→  'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700',
    22→  'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700',
    23→  'bg-violet-100 text-violet-700',
    24→  'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-700',
    25→  'bg-pink-100 text-pink-700',
    26→  'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700',
    27→]
    28→
    29→export function avatarColor(name: string): string {
    30→  let hash = 0
    31→  for (const ch of name) hash = (hash * 31 + ch.charCodeAt(0)) % AVATAR_COLORS.length
    32→  return AVATAR_COLORS[Math.abs(hash)]
    33→}
    34→
    35→export function daysSince(date: Date | string | null | undefined): number | null {
    36→  if (!date) return null
    37→  const d = typeof date === 'string' ? new Date(date) : date
    38→  if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return null
    39→  return Math.floor((Date.now() - d.getTime()) / 86400000)
    40→}
    41→
    42→export function formatRelativeDate(date: Date | string | null | undefined): string {
    43→  const days = daysSince(date)
    44→  if (days === null) return 'Never'
    45→  if (days === 0) return 'Today'
    46→  if (days === 1) return 'Yesterday'
    47→  if (days < 7) return `${days}d ago`
    48→  if (days < 30) return `${Math.floor(days / 7)}w ago`
    49→  if (days < 365) return `${Math.floor(days / 30)}mo ago`
    50→  return `${Math.floor(days / 365)}y ago`
    51→}
    52→

1→import NextAuth from 'next-auth'
     2→import Google from 'next-auth/providers/google'
     3→import { DrizzleAdapter } from '@auth/drizzle-adapter'
     4→import { db } from '@/lib/db'
     5→import { users, accounts, sessions, verificationTokens } from '@/lib/db/schema'
     6→
     7→export const { handlers, auth, signIn, signOut } = NextAuth({
     8→  adapter: DrizzleAdapter(db, {
     9→    usersTable: users,
    10→    accountsTable: accounts,
    11→    sessionsTable: sessions,
    12→    verificationTokensTable: verificationTokens,
    13→  }),
    14→  providers: [
    15→    Google({
    16→      clientId: process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID,
    17→      clientSecret: process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET,
    18→      authorization: {
    19→        params: {
    20→          scope: 'openid email profile',
    21→          prompt: 'consent',
    22→          access_type: 'offline',
    23→        },
    24→      },
    25→    }),
    26→  ],
    27→  session: { strategy: 'jwt' },
    28→  pages: {
    29→    signIn: '/login',
    30→  },
    31→  callbacks: {
    32→    async jwt({ token, user }) {
    33→      if (user) {
    34→        token.id = user.id
    35→      }
    36→      return token
    37→    },
    38→    async session({ session, token }) {
    39→      if (session.user && token.id) {
    40→        session.user.id = token.id as string
    41→      }
    42→      return session
    43→    },
    44→  },
    45→})

1→import { db } from '@/lib/db'
     2→import { workspaces, workspaceMembers } from '@/lib/db/schema'
     3→import { eq, and } from 'drizzle-orm'
     4→
     5→export async function getWorkspaceForUser(userId: string) {
     6→  const membership = await db
     7→    .select({ workspace: workspaces })
     8→    .from(workspaceMembers)
     9→    .innerJoin(workspaces, eq(workspaceMembers.workspaceId, workspaces.id))
    10→    .where(eq(workspaceMembers.userId, userId))
    11→    .limit(1)
    12→
    13→  if (membership.length > 0) {
    14→    return membership[0].workspace
    15→  }
    16→
    17→  // Auto-create workspace for new users
    18→  const [workspace] = await db
    19→    .insert(workspaces)
    20→    .values({
    21→      name: 'My Workspace',
    22→      slug: `ws-${userId.slice(0, 8)}`,
    23→      ownerId: userId,
    24→    })
    25→    .returning()
    26→
    27→  await db.insert(workspaceMembers).values({
    28→    workspaceId: workspace.id,
    29→    userId,
    30→    role: 'owner',
    31→  })
    32→
    33→  return workspace
    34→}
    35→
    36→export async function requireWorkspace(userId: string) {
    37→  const workspace = await getWorkspaceForUser(userId)
    38→  if (!workspace) throw new Error('No workspace found')
    39→  return workspace
    40→}

content.text:
All files have been created successfully. Here is a complete summary of everything that was built:

---

## Summary: Greg CRM UI - Complete Component Library & App Pages

### 1. UI Primitives (`/components/ui/`) -- 18 files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `button.tsx` | Button with CVA variants (default, outline, ghost, destructive, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Uses `@radix-ui/react-slot` for `asChild` support. |
| `input.tsx` | Styled `<input>` with border, focus ring, and placeholder styling. |
| `textarea.tsx` | Styled `<textarea>` matching the input aesthetic. |
| `badge.tsx` | Badge with CVA variants: default, secondary, outline, plus 9 color variants (rose, blue, amber, emerald, violet, cyan, pink, orange, gray) with subtle border+background combos. |
| `avatar.tsx` | Wraps `@radix-ui/react-avatar` with `Avatar`, `AvatarImage`, `AvatarFallback`. |
| `dialog.tsx` | Wraps `@radix-ui/react-dialog` with overlay, content panel, header/footer/title/description. Centered modal with close button. |
| `sheet.tsx` | Slide-over panel using `@radix-ui/react-dialog`. Supports `side="right"` (default) and `side="left"`. Slides in/out with animation classes. Critical for contact/company detail views. |
| `dropdown-menu.tsx` | Full `@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu` wrapper with item, checkbox item, radio item, label, separator, shortcut, sub-menu support. |
| `popover.tsx` | `@radix-ui/react-popover` with portal, content positioning, and animation. |
| `select.tsx` | `@radix-ui/react-select` with trigger, content, item (with check indicator), scroll buttons, separator. |
| `tabs.tsx` | `@radix-ui/react-tabs` with list, trigger (active state with shadow), and content. |
| `tooltip.tsx` | `@radix-ui/react-tooltip` with provider, trigger, and content. |
| `separator.tsx` | `@radix-ui/react-separator` supporting horizontal/vertical orientation. |
| `scroll-area.tsx` | `@radix-ui/react-scroll-area` with scrollbar thumb styling. |
| `command.tsx` | `cmdk` wrapper with input (search icon), list, empty state, group, item, separator, shortcut. |
| `table.tsx` | HTML table components (Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, etc.) with consistent border and hover styling. |
| `label.tsx` | `@radix-ui/react-label` with font styling. |
| `card.tsx` | Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter -- simple containers with border+shadow. |
| `skeleton.tsx` | Loading skeleton with `animate-pulse` and `bg-background-muted`. |

### 2. Layout Components (`/components/layout/`) -- 3 files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `sidebar.tsx` | 280px wide sidebar with: workspace header (black circle "G" logo), "Ask Greg" command bar button with Cmd+K shortcut, navigation links (Contacts, Companies, Pipelines, Activity with lucide icons), collapsible Tags section with color dots and counts, and UserMenu at bottom. Uses `usePathname()` for active state highlighting. |
| `app-shell.tsx` | Flex layout wrapper: sidebar on left, `<main>` content area filling remaining space. Full height. |
| `user-menu.tsx` | Avatar + name trigger with DropdownMenu containing Settings link and Sign out button. Uses `signOut` from next-auth. |

### 3. Shared Components (`/components/shared/`) -- 6 files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `data-table.tsx` | Generic `DataTable<TData>` using TanStack Table v8. Supports column sorting (click header with ArrowUpDown icon), row click handler, empty state message. Renders using the ui/table components. |
| `data-table-toolbar.tsx` | Search input with search icon + optional children for additional filter controls. |
| `tag-badge.tsx` | Maps tag color string names to Badge color variants. Supports optional `onRemove` with X button. |
| `tag-input.tsx` | Multi-select tag input: shows selected tags as removable TagBadges, Popover with Command for searching/toggling available tags with checkboxes. |
| `empty-state.tsx` | Centered empty state with icon in a rounded circle, title, description, and optional action Button. |
| `contact-avatar.tsx` | Avatar using `initials()` and `avatarColor()` from utils for deterministic color. Supports sm/md/lg sizes and optional `avatarUrl`. |

### 4. Contacts Components (`/components/contacts/`) -- 3 files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `contacts-table.tsx` | DataTable with columns: Name (avatar+email), Company, Title, Tags (badge list, max 3 shown), Last contacted (color-coded: green <30d, amber <60d, red >60d), Next action. Exports `ContactRow` type. |
| `contact-sheet.tsx` | Sheet slide-over panel showing: large avatar + name + title, company link, email/phone/linkedin/twitter links with icons, tags, action buttons (Log interaction, Edit, Delete). Three tabs: Overview (last contacted, next action, source), Activity (ActivityTimeline), Notes. |
| `contact-form.tsx` | Full contact form with: name (required), email, phone, company (Select from existing), title, linkedin, twitter, source, tags (TagInput), notes (Textarea). Grid layout for field pairs. Submit/Cancel buttons with loading state. |

### 5. Companies Components (`/components/companies/`) -- 3 files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `companies-table.tsx` | DataTable with columns: Name (with letter icon), Domain (as link), Industry, Contacts count, Created date. |
| `company-sheet.tsx` | Sheet slide-over with company icon, name, industry, domain link, size, description, Edit/Delete buttons, and a scrollable list of linked contacts with avatars. |
| `company-form.tsx` | Form with: company name (required), domain, industry, size, website, LinkedIn, description. Grid layout. Submit/Cancel. |

### 6. Pipeline Components (`/components/pipelines/`) -- 3 files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `pipeline-board.tsx` | Full kanban board using `@dnd-kit/core`. DndContext with PointerSensor, collision detection, drag overlay. Manages stage state, handles drag-over (move cards between columns) and drag-end (reorder within column). Horizontal scroll with ScrollArea. Calls `onMoveContact` callback. |
| `pipeline-column.tsx` | Single kanban column with header (color dot, stage name, count), droppable area using `useDroppable`, and SortableContext for cards. Highlights on drag-over. |
| `pipeline-card.tsx` | Draggable card using `useSortable`. Shows grip handle (visible on hover), avatar, name, company, and up to 2 tag badges. Shadow elevation on drag. |

### 7. Activity Components (`/components/activity/`) -- 2 files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `activity-timeline.tsx` | Renders a vertical list of ActivityItem components. Shows empty state if no items. |
| `activity-item.tsx` | Single timeline item with: colored icon circle (based on type: note=blue, email_sent=emerald, email_received=violet, call=amber, meeting=rose, stage_change=cyan), title, contact name, relative timestamp, body preview (2-line clamp). Vertical timeline connector line between items. |

### 8. AI Components (`/components/ai/`) -- 2 files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `command-bar.tsx` | Spotlight/Raycast-style command palette. Fixed modal overlay. Three modes: (1) Default search -- debounced fetch to `/api/contacts`, shows results with avatars, (2) Slash commands -- /add, /log, /email, /pipeline with icons, (3) AI chat -- sends input to `/api/agent`, shows conversation inline with Sparkles icon, renders proposed ActionReview cards. Cmd+K / Escape keyboard shortcuts. |
| `action-review.tsx` | Card showing a proposed AI action with type icon (add_contact, log_interaction, send_email, move_pipeline), description, details, and Approve/Dismiss buttons. |

### 9. Providers (`/components/providers.tsx`)

Wraps children with `QueryClientProvider` (TanStack Query with 60s stale time) and `SessionProvider` (next-auth). Includes `Toaster` from sonner with theme-aware styling.

### 10. App Pages -- 9 files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `app/layout.tsx` | Root layout with metadata, imports globals.css, wraps children in Providers. |
| `app/page.tsx` | Redirects to `/contacts` using `redirect()`. |
| `app/login/page.tsx` | Centered login card with "G" logo, welcome text, and "Sign in with Google" button (includes Google SVG icon). |
| `app/(app)/layout.tsx` | Authenticated layout. Checks session (redirects to /login if unauthenticated), renders AppShell with Sidebar, fetches tags, manages CommandBar state. Routes slash commands to appropriate pages. Loading spinner while session loads. Wraps in TooltipProvider. |
| `app/(app)/contacts/page.tsx` | Full contacts page: header with count + "Add contact" button, search toolbar, loading skeletons, empty state, ContactsTable with row click -> ContactSheet, Dialog with ContactForm for adding. Toast notifications on success/error. |
| `app/(app)/companies/page.tsx` | Same pattern as contacts: header, toolbar, table, sheet, add dialog. |
| `app/(app)/pipelines/page.tsx` | Pipeline list with cards showing name, description, stage count, contact count. Grid layout. Empty state. |
| `app/(app)/pipelines/[id]/page.tsx` | Pipeline detail page: back button + title header, full-height PipelineBoard kanban. Loading skeletons. Not-found fallback. |
| `app/(app)/activity/page.tsx` | Activity timeline page: header, search toolbar with type filter buttons (All, Notes, Emails sent, etc.), centered ActivityTimeline in ScrollArea. |
| `app/(app)/settings/page.tsx` | Settings page: workspace name input with save button, account info display, integrations section (Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack -- all "Coming soon"). |

### Design Notes

- **Color palette**: Warm neutrals with `#fafaf8` base, `#e8e6e1` borders, `#1a1a1a` primary -- all from CSS variables in globals.css
- **Typography**: System font stack (`-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Inter'`)
- **Interactions**: Minimal borders, subtle shadows, smooth transitions, hover states on all interactive elements
- **All new files compile cleanly** -- zero TypeScript errors in any component or page file (pre-existing errors in lib/auth are unrelated)
